{{Quote|Dominator AV: A great all-rounder with a turret laser to boot.|BlastBoast 2000 advertisement|<ref name="Enemies for Life">{{JournalCite|4|Enemies for Life}}</ref>}}
The '''Dominator AV''' was a modified [[Dominator landspeeder]] which came with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] turret. It was among the permitted vehicles in the dangerous [[BlastBoast 2000]] demolition race in [[Echnos City]] and was available for rental for contestants in the event.<ref name="Enemies for Life" />

==Appearances==
